title: alstroemeria citrina
intro: Alstroemeria citrina, also known as the yellow alstroemeria or the Peruvian lily, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Alstroemeria genus. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions such as wounds, infections, and fever. The health benefits of Alstroemeria citrina include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential natural remedy for various diseases. The herbal preparations of Alstroemeria citrina include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
